name: CARE HCX
description: Health Claims Exchange (HCX) integration plugin for CARE. Enables insurance claim processing, preauthorization, and communication with health insurance payers through the HCX protocol.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_hcx_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.
